purpose.body: workspace.json is the local workspace marker for tools that operate across projects, imports, archives, or a sibling SocratexAI source checkout. It is not a project memory file and must not be stored inside an individual project repository as the canonical source of truth.

canonical_location.body: Store workspace.json in the workspace root next to SocratexAI/. A typical layout is <workspace>/workspace.json, <workspace>/SocratexAI/, <workspace>/<Project>/, <workspace>/tools/, <workspace>/_archive/, and <workspace>/drive-exports/.

discovery_order.body: Workspace-aware tools should search upward from the current project or script path for a directory containing workspace.json and SocratexAI/. If no marker is found, they may use SOCRATEX_WORKSPACE_ROOT only as an explicit local override, then fail with a clear message rather than guessing a hardcoded home path.

path_contract.body: Paths inside workspace.json should be relative to the directory containing workspace.json unless an external service requires a URI. Project scripts should continue resolving their own repository roots relative to script location; workspace.json is only for workspace-level tools and sibling source checkout discovery.

update_behavior.body: During pipeline update, agents should use workspace.json to resolve a local sibling SocratexAI source checkout when the project config points to a local source such as ../SocratexAI. Do not bake /home/<user>/work, /home/<user>/projects, drive-imports, or repos paths into source pipeline scripts or project configs.
